Home / Services / Concrete Repair & Leveling

Concrete Repair & Leveling

Fixes for Minnesota's frost-heaved and spalled concrete.

Before applying any decorative coating, we address the structural issues unique to our region. The freeze-thaw cycle destroys 60% of Twin Cities concrete within 15 years. Our polyurethane foam injection lifts sunken slabs without demolition, while polymer-modified repair mortars restore edges damaged by snowplows.

For Northeast Minneapolis' historic warehouse conversions, we use precision grinding to eliminate trip hazards while preserving original concrete character. In new Maple Grove developments, we apply shrinkage-compensating overlays that prevent the hairline cracks common in fast-track construction. Every repair includes thermal imaging to detect voids and moisture channels invisible to the naked eye - because coating over problems guarantees failure in our climate.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Ground-penetrating radar scan for voids
  2. 02 Step 2: Polyurethane foam injection for lifting
  3. 03 Step 3: Steel-reinforced edge repairs
  4. 04 Step 4: Permeability testing before coatings

Benefits

  • Prevents recurring damage from frost heave
  • Restores proper drainage slope
  • Eliminates icy low spots in winter
  • Prepares surface for long-lasting coatings

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you fix my crumbling garage apron?

Yes - we replace deteriorated edges with steel-fiber reinforced concrete that withstands snowplow blades and salt exposure better than original material.

How long until I can park on repaired slabs?

Our fast-set formulations allow vehicle traffic in 4 hours - critical for Minnesota winters when garages can't be out of service for days.

Will repairs match my existing concrete?

We custom-tint repair materials to blend seamlessly - our color database includes exact matches for common Twin Cities concrete mixes from every decade since 1950.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with concrete repair & leveling? Contact us today.
